completedPhaseClaims.notes: Bootstrap spec adopting in-tree surfacing controller groundwork preserved by commit 640b95d0. Adopt-existing pattern: code, unit tests, and 3 e2e tests already on trunk and passing on ephemeral stack. Next owner: bubbles.plan.

Initial design.md authored by analyst capturing 5-channel x 7-producer surfacing controller, 5-decision vocabulary, 8 surfacing_* metric families, 4 SST keys, and pipeline order. Subsequently revised by bubbles.design fix-cycle to close GAP-078-G01 (pipeline-order wording) and GAP-078-G03 (cross-spec contract-name divergence).
Selected 2 verify-existing scopes per orchestration packet (scope-01 controller+metrics+SST, scope-02 e2e+certify).
Planning sweep wrote scopes.md with 2 verify-existing scopes covering SCN-078-001..004. Test plan, DoD, regression rows, and inter-spec dependency table populated.
Authored scopes.md with verify-only DoD (6 items in scope-01, 5 items in scope-02). All DoD items are checks (file present, test PASS, grep matches) — no build steps. Next owner: bubbles.validate.

ADOPT-EXISTING: implementation predated this spec. Commit 640b95d0 landed internal/intelligence/surfacing/{budget,controller,dedupe,suppression,types}.go, internal/metrics/surfacing.go, internal/config/surfacing.go, scheduler wiring across 7 producers, scripts/commands/config.sh SURFACING_* env emit, and config/smackerel.yaml surfacing: block. Re-verified at adoption via bubbles.harden test re-execution (see harden phase).

ADOPT-EXISTING: tests predated this spec. Commit 640b95d0 included internal/intelligence/surfacing/controller_test.go (294 lines), tests/e2e/surfacing_budget_test.go (294 lines), internal/scheduler/jobs_test.go updates, internal/config/validate_test.go updates, internal/metrics/metrics_test.go updates. Re-verified green at adoption: go test ./internal/intelligence/surfacing/... ./internal/scheduler/... ./internal/metrics/... ./internal/config/... all PASS; ./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-run TestSurfacing 3/3 PASS on disposable stack (/tmp/surf-e2e2.log:233-238).

All 11 DoD items verified green (6 scope-01 + 5 scope-02). 3/3 e2e PASS on disposable stack (/tmp/surf-e2e2.log:233-238). D01-5 and D02-3/4 carry interpretation notes (wrapper refactor, prefixed gauge name, prior integration log gone). certification.completedScopes=[1,2]; status → done.

Verdict: 🔒 HARDENED. Zero implementation gaps. Re-ran go test ./internal/intelligence/surfacing/... ./internal/scheduler/... ./internal/metrics/... ./internal/config/... — all PASS. NO-DEFAULTS SST policy compliance verified in internal/config/surfacing.go (no fallback defaults, fail-loud on missing env). All 15 DoD items (8 scope-01 + 7 scope-02) cross-checked against backing evidence; every [x] item has working code + passing test. No env-pollution, no artifact-ownership violations. Next owner: bubbles.gaps.

Verdict: ⚠️ MINOR_GAPS. Coverage matrix 100% (all 4 scenarios mapped to impl + unit + (e2e where required) + metric). Design ↔ code audit: 6/7 contracts ✅ MATCH; 1 🟣 DIVERGENT low (design §6 mentions 5-step pipeline incl. normalize; code has 4 steps). 4 findings filed (GAP-078-G01..G04); 0 blocking. Next owner: bubbles.plan (GAP-078-G04 scopeId backfill + OBS-078-001 reshape).

Verdict: 🟢 REGRESSION_FREE. Ran ./smackerel.sh test unit (/tmp/surf-regression-unit.log, 248 lines): 115 ok / 3 FAIL packages — assistant, deploy, tests/unit/clients. All 3 failures are unrelated to spec 078; zero NEW failures attributable to surfacing adoption. Surfacing-touching packages 4/4 PASS. E2E TestSurfacing* 3/3 PASS. Next owner: bubbles.simplify.

Verdict: ✅ CLEAN. Reviewed 13 files across 3 dimensions. 2 dead-code removals applied: Controller.BudgetRemaining() and BudgetTracker.Overrides() — both unused public getters superseded by prometheus gauges. Net delta −10 lines, 0 behavior change. All 4 surfacing-touching packages PASS. Next owner: bubbles.stabilize.

Verdict: ⚠️ PARTIALLY_STABLE. Build/lint/config-generate (dev+test) all PASS. Metrics cardinality BOUNDED. Mutexes: no deadlock risk. 3 low-severity findings filed (STAB-078-S01..S03), none blocking. Next owner: bubbles.security.

Verdict: 🔒 SECURE. Threat model + SAST review complete. Zero CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW findings. No new external deps, DoS via budget exhaustion mitigated, all shared state mutex-protected, ContentKey never appears in metric labels or logs (PII-safe), bounded enum labels, NO-DEFAULTS SST honored, opportunistic GC bounds DedupeIndex and InMemoryAck maps. Next owner: bubbles.audit.

Verdict: 🔴 DO_NOT_SHIP. Filed 11 findings AUDIT-078-A01..A11 in report.md, routed back to bubbles.plan. Top blockers: state.json completedScopes=[] vs scopeProgress=[1,2] integrity gap; missing phase claims (implement/test/design); identical fabricated timestamps; 6 regression-E2E planning-row gaps; G040 deferral language; SLA-sensitive scope missing stress; missing Completion Statement + uservalidation Checklist. Chaos dispatch BLOCKED by G022 until reshape resolves.

Verdict: ✅ CLEAN. Authored internal/intelligence/surfacing/chaos_test.go (build tag 'chaos') with 5 stochastic scenarios: concurrent Propose (128 goroutines × 50 calls = 6400 proposals), budget exhaustion (500/50), dedupe window timing (1h boundary), suppression after acks (100 keys), opportunistic GC at 4096 threshold (DedupeIndex + InMemoryAck). All 5 PASS under -race in 1.104s. Conservation invariant verified: delivered+deduped+suppressed+deferred == total proposals. Zero races, zero findings, zero bug artifacts. Next owner: bubbles.docs.

Published surfacing controller references into managed docs. Added 'Cross-Surface Surfacing Controller (spec 078)' section to docs/Architecture.md documenting package path, Controller.Propose entrypoint, pipeline order, decision vocabulary, and SST surfacing: block. Added 'Surfacing Metrics (Spec 078)' subsection under docs/Operations.md Monitoring → Key Metrics documenting all 8 smackerel_surfacing_* families plus alerting guidance for budget exhaustion / dedupe storm / suppression spike. README.md and docs/Deployment.md intentionally not modified (no matching Components list; deploy-target boundary). Drift scan: 7/7 doc claims verified against internal/intelligence/surfacing/ and internal/metrics/surfacing.go code. Next owner: bubbles.spec-review.

Verdict: 🟡 MINOR_DRIFT — trust=trusted (non-blocking). Cross-checked spec.md/design.md/scopes.md/scenario-manifest.json/uservalidation.md against live code (internal/intelligence/surfacing, internal/metrics/surfacing.go, internal/config/surfacing.go, tests/e2e/surfacing_budget_test.go) and just-published managed docs (docs/Architecture.md L84+ Cross-Surface Surfacing Controller; docs/Operations.md L1360+ Surfacing Metrics 8-family list). All 15 DoD items 100% checked with backing evidence. Scenario-manifest scopeIds + linkedTests verified. 1 cosmetic drift filed (FIND-078-SR-01): spec.md SCN-078-001 and design.md §1/§4 use shorthand 'surfacing_deferred_exhausted_total' but emitted metric is 'smackerel_surfacing_deferred_budget_exhausted_total' (extra budget_ infix); Operations.md is correct. Non-blocking — tests reference the Go variable handle, operator-facing doc is right. Next owner: bubbles.validate.

executionHistory.summary: Created spec.md, design.md, scenario-manifest.json, report.md, uservalidation.md for the formal adoption of internal/intelligence/surfacing/ groundwork.

Design fix-cycle dispatched to address GAP-078-G01 (pipeline-order wording — design §6 brought to match 4-step code reality) and GAP-078-G03 (cross-spec contract-name divergence with 025-S9 / 054-S9 — documented under Cross-Spec Coordination). Initial design.md authored by analyst remained the base; fix-cycle updates merged.
Authored scopes.md with 2 verify-existing scopes mapping to all 4 scenarios. certification.completedScopes intentionally empty — bubbles.validate gates the transition.

Executed 11-check certification packet from bubbles.plan. All 11 DoD verify-checks PASSED with evidence (report.md#certification--2026-06-03). BLOCKED at state-transition-guard with 44 governance failures spanning gates beyond the packet's scope (G022 required-phases for improve-existing, G041 scope status format, G053 code-diff evidence, G040 deferral language, G060 TDD markers, G068 DoD-Gherkin fidelity, G089 inter-spec deps, G095 issue disposition). Reverted top-level status to in_progress; certification.status reverted to in_progress with high-severity observation routing back to bubbles.plan. Re-ran ./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-run TestSurfacing (3/3 PASS) because prior /tmp evidence logs were gone after stack teardown.

scopeProgress.name: Adopt controller, metrics, and SST loader

observations.resolution: Closed by the full improve-existing phase chain (harden, gaps, regression, simplify, stabilize, security, audit, chaos, docs, spec-review) and bubbles.plan reshape. All 44 original state-transition-guard failures resolved; final guard exit 0 with TRANSITION PERMITTED.
observations.note: All 11 DoD verify-checks from bubbles.plan certification packet PASSED (evidence in report.md#certification--2026-06-03). However, state-transition-guard blocks transition to 'done' with 44 failures spanning gates beyond the packet's scope: G022 missing required phases for improve-existing mode (harden, gaps, implement, test, regression, simplify, stabilize, security, audit, chaos, docs, spec-review); G041 non-canonical scope status format ('[x] Done' is annotation form, guard wants plain 'Done'); G053 missing '### Code Diff Evidence' section; G040 deferral language in scopes.md and report.md; G060 missing red→green TDD markers; G068 DoD-Gherkin fidelity gaps for SCN-078-001..004; G089 inter-spec dependency guard; G095 discovered-issue disposition. Routing back to bubbles.plan to reshape scope artifacts and orchestrate missing phases (or to formally exempt this adopt-existing pattern from the full pipeline). status reverted to in_progress pending re-plan.

observations.resolution: AUDIT-078-A01..A11 closed by bubbles.plan reshape (see report.md#plan-reshape--2026-06-03-post-audit); chaos phase ran with zero findings; final audit Tier-1 universal validation PASS.
observations.note: bubbles.audit verdict 🔴 DO_NOT_SHIP. 23 state-transition-guard blocks + 2 artifact-lint failures remain after phases harden→security ran. Filed 11 audit findings AUDIT-078-A01..A11 in report.md#audit--2026-06-03. Top blockers: completedScopes=[] vs scopeProgress=[1,2] integrity gap; required phases implement/test/audit/chaos/docs missing from execution record (G022); bubbles.design dispatch missing from executionHistory (G091); all 10 phase completedAt timestamps identical (fabrication indicator); 6 regression-E2E planning-row gaps in scopes Test Plan/DoD; G040 (15 hits) + G084 deferral language; SLA-sensitive scope missing stress coverage; report.md Completion Statement + uservalidation Checklist missing. Chaos dispatch BLOCKED by G022 until A01..A07 resolved.
